mapper.insert: INSERT INTO college_teacher (college_id, teacher_id, is_dean, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{collegeId}, #{teacherId}, #{isDean}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT ct.id, ct.college_id, col.name AS collegeName, ct.teacher_id, t.name AS teacherName, t.title AS teacherTitle, ct.is_dean, ct.create_time, ct.update_time FROM college_teacher ct LEFT JOIN college col ON col.id = ct.college_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON t.id = ct.teacher_id WHERE ct.college_id = #{collegeId} ORDER BY ct.is_dean DESC, ct.id ASC

SELECT ct.id, ct.college_id, col.name AS collegeName, ct.teacher_id, t.name AS teacherName, t.title AS teacherTitle, ct.is_dean, ct.create_time, ct.update_time FROM college_teacher ct LEFT JOIN college col ON col.id = ct.college_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON t.id = ct.teacher_id WHERE ct.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY ct.id ASC

SELECT ct.id, ct.college_id, col.name AS collegeName, ct.teacher_id, t.name AS teacherName, t.title AS teacherTitle, ct.is_dean, ct.create_time, ct.update_time FROM college_teacher ct LEFT JOIN college col ON col.id = ct.college_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON t.id = ct.teacher_id WHERE ct.college_id = #{collegeId} AND ct.is_dean = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM college_teacher WHERE college_id = #{collegeId}
